structured.name: Update Tariff Information During Transaction
structured.objective: To show an EV Driver updated tariff information during a transaction.

requirements.precondition:
When the CSMS receives a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Updated) from the Charging Station.
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL check if there is updated tariff information
available.

requirements.precondition:
I06.FR.01 AND
When there is updated tariff information
available.
requirements.definition:
The CSMS SHALL respond with a TransactionEventResponse
message to the Charging Station, containing the updated tariff
information in the updatedPersonalMessage field.

The Charging Station SHALL display the updated tariff
information to the EV Driver.

chunks.content:
# I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction

**Objective:** To show an EV Driver updated tariff information during a transaction.

**Description:**

metadata.heading: I06 - Update Tariff Information During Transaction

chunks.content:
# I06 - Requirements

**I06.FR.01**
Precondition: When the CSMS receives a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType =
Updated) from the Charging Station.
The CSMS SHALL check if there is updated tariff information
available.

**I06.FR.02**
Precondition: I06.FR.01 AND
When there is updated tariff information
available.
The CSMS SHALL respond with a TransactionEventResponse
message to the Charging Station, containing the updated tariff
information in the updatedPersonalMessage field.

**I06.FR.03**
Precondition: I06.FR.02
The Charging Station SHALL display the updated tariff
information to the EV Driver.
